A.text: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.

B.text: The bottom and middle balls remain connected, but the top ball separates.

C.text: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.

D.text: All three balls detach and fall off as separate pieces.

parsed.answer_value: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.
parsed.rationale: The cut through the curved tube does not disconnect the structure because the Seifert surface is continuous and the tubes provide structural integrity, keeping all three balls connected.
